name: Memory (Memoria)
description: Memoria-backed long-term memory plugin for OpenClaw with local-first embedded mode and optional HTTP mode.

backend.label: Backend Mode
backend.help: embedded connects directly to MatrixOne through the bundled Python runtime; http connects to an existing Memoria API.

dbUrl.label: MatrixOne Connection String
dbUrl.help: Default points to a local MatrixOne on 127.0.0.1:6001. Replace it with a MatrixOne Cloud DSN to switch to cloud without changing backend mode.

pythonExecutable.label: Python Executable
pythonExecutable.help: Python interpreter used by the embedded bridge.

memoriaRoot.label: External Memoria Root
memoriaRoot.help: Optional path to another Memoria checkout or installed package root. Leave empty to use the bundled source in this plugin.

defaultUserId.label: Default User ID
defaultUserId.help: Single-user quick-start identity used by embedded mode unless userIdStrategy derives one from the OpenClaw context.

userIdStrategy.label: User ID Strategy
userIdStrategy.help: config keeps one shared Memoria user; agentId or sessionKey derive the identity from OpenClaw runtime context.

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Automatically inject relevant memories into the prompt before each run.

autoObserve.label: Auto-Observe
autoObserve.help: Automatically extract memories from recent conversation turns at agent_end.

retrieveTopK.label: Recall Top K
retrieveTopK.help: Maximum number of memories returned for memory_search and auto-recall.

recallMinPromptLength.label: Recall Min Length
recallMinPromptLength.help: Prompts shorter than this are skipped for auto-recall.

includeCrossSession.label: Cross-Session Recall
includeCrossSession.help: When disabled, embedded retrieval is scoped to the current sessionId when one exists.

retrieveMemoryTypes.label: Memory Types
retrieveMemoryTypes.help: Optional memory types to include during memory_search and auto-recall.

observeTailMessages.label: Observe Tail Messages
observeTailMessages.help: Number of recent user/assistant messages forwarded to observe_turn.

observeMaxChars.label: Observe Max Chars
observeMaxChars.help: Maximum total characters forwarded to observe_turn.

timeoutMs.label: Request Timeout
timeoutMs.help: Timeout for HTTP requests and embedded bridge calls in milliseconds.

maxListPages.label: List Page Limit
maxListPages.help: Maximum number of HTTP list pages scanned when resolving memoria:// paths in HTTP mode.

embeddingProvider.label: Embedding Provider
embeddingProvider.help: Embedded mode only. local is the fastest zero-key setup; openai supports OpenAI-compatible endpoints.

embeddingBaseUrl.label: Embedding Base URL
embeddingBaseUrl.help: Embedded mode only. Optional for OpenAI-compatible providers.

embeddingApiKey.label: Embedding API Key
embeddingApiKey.help: Embedded mode only. Required for providers such as OpenAI, SiliconFlow, or OpenAI-compatible endpoints.

embeddingDim.label: Embedding Dimensions
embeddingDim.help: Embedded mode only. Leave empty for known models.

llmApiKey.label: Observer LLM API Key
llmApiKey.help: Optional. Enables auto-observe extraction and reflection-style features in embedded mode.

llmBaseUrl.label: Observer LLM Base URL
llmBaseUrl.help: Optional OpenAI-compatible base URL for embedded auto-observe.

llmModel.label: Observer LLM Model
llmModel.help: Model used by embedded auto-observe and related extraction flows.
